source_owned_runtime.purpose: Execution, queues, gates, positions, fund scheduling, live guards.
source_owned_runtime.mcp_policy: No MCP in final live execution path.

source_review_and_audit.purpose: Source ownership, cross-market refresh, operator panel, daily checklist.
source_review_and_audit.mcp_policy: Prefer local source artifacts; MCP only for read-only diagnostics or documentation.

research_enrichment.purpose: Research-only sidecars, external context, non-live market enrichment.
research_enrichment.mcp_policy: Allowed: CoinGecko, Jin10. Do not promote MCP-derived fields into live routing.

ui_and_browser_surface.purpose: Read-only dashboard validation, browser flow inspection, design implementation.
ui_and_browser_surface.mcp_policy: Allowed: Playwright, JSHook, Figma; never mutate live queues or capital.

knowledge_and_planning.purpose: Documentation, specs, PM sync, external knowledge capture.
knowledge_and_planning.mcp_policy: Allowed after auth health clears: Notion, Linear.

hard_rules: No MCP-derived data may become final source-of-truth for live routing, live capital, queue mutation, or fund scheduling.
Browser MCPs are read-only diagnostics/reverse-engineering tools, not live trading clients.
Research MCPs are sidecars only; they may enrich briefs and review artifacts but must not silently override source-owned strategy metrics.
Auth-blocked MCPs must be marked blocked instead of assumed healthy.

status_actions.verified_tools_available: Can enter its approved non-live lane immediately.
status_actions.verified_resources_available: Can be used now for docs/design/resource-backed workflows.
status_actions.verified_auth_and_resources_available: Can be used now and treated as auth-healthy for its approved lane.
status_actions.verified_environment_and_search_availabl: Can be used now for diagnostics/discovery workflows.
status_actions.configured_not_resource_driven: Treat as configured; verify with a live smoke check before broad workflow use.
status_actions.configured_not_yet_session_validated: Do one session-level validation before promoting into the default playbook.
status_actions.blocked_auth_refresh_failed: Repair OAuth/auth locally before routing any workflow through this MCP.
status_actions.blocked_initialize_failed: Fix connectivity/server initialization before routing any workflow through this MCP.
